stride.control_or_reason: user-provided strings wrapped in ~~~text fences; rendered as descriptive Markdown only, never selecting status/disposition/control fields
generated text never chooses id/status/disposition/classification; author-controlled
validation column requires executable proof of readiness, not a self-asserted checkbox; /slo-execute Global Entry re-reads
safe_to_continue_without_blockers:false makes /slo-execute refuse to start — fails closed
every row carries Owner + Evidence/link + Due; /slo-execute refuses done while a row is undisposed
secrets-in-evidence prevented by existing secrets-scan lane + no-secrets red line
closed enum; unknown value -> parser fallback to blocked (never silent done); structural test asserts old four still parse
reuses /slo-retro filing discipline (dedupe, fence, per-session cap); no new privileged path
ship_state + residual-risk owner + monitoring links recorded; SBOM/provenance when applicable
baseline/SHA changes explicit and PR-reviewed; never waived
no runtime, no network, no bounded resource at risk
a determined author can hand-author a thin/dishonest contract; framework raises cost of faking, cannot enforce integrity

abuse_cases.attack_step: Paste Markdown/YAML/HTML metacharacters into a Value Wedge / ledger / readiness field to break out of the section or smuggle agent-readable instructions into a generated artifact
abuse_cases.attacker_outcome: Template-placeholder injection altering security defaults or injecting instructions
abuse_cases.control: All user strings rendered into generated security/threat artifacts wrapped in ~~~text fences (reuse of /slo-architect + /slo-resume fence rules); fields render user text as plain Markdown body only and never select control fields

abuse_cases.attack_step: Mark Operator Readiness ready / safe_to_continue_without_blockers:true without the prerequisite actually provisioned
abuse_cases.attacker_outcome: /slo-execute starts and stalls mid-run or proceeds on a degraded/mocked path
abuse_cases.control: validation column requires an executable proof of readiness; /slo-execute Global Entry re-reads and must name the deferred path when degraded; status falls to blocked_by_operator rather than silent in_progress

abuse_cases.attack_step: Mark a real cross-boundary finding fix_now (or omit it) to avoid filing an issue or splitting scope
abuse_cases.attacker_outcome: Security debt silently absorbed; finding never reaches /slo-retro filing
abuse_cases.control: fix_now reserved for safe/local/in-allow-list findings (proposal s6 list); /slo-execute refuses done while a row is undisposed; /slo-retro re-reads the ledger and files file_github_issue/upstream_feedback through existing lanes (dedupe + cap apply)

abuse_cases.attack_step: A new status value is read by a legacy parser that does not recognise it and is silently treated as done
abuse_cases.attacker_outcome: An unfinished/blocked milestone reads as complete
abuse_cases.control: documented parser rule unknown-status -> blocked semantics, never done; structural test asserts the old four parse and new values are listed in the template comment

residual_risks.risk: Author can hand-author a thin/dishonest Secure Value Contract
residual_risks.exploit_path: Framework forces shape and cross-checks, not the team's integrity
residual_risks.compensating_control: /slo-plan + /slo-verify + /slo-retro raise the cost of faking; mitigation not elimination (tm-secure-value-loop-abuse-3)

residual_risks.risk: Envelope generates guidance; does not enforce a target product's runtime security
residual_risks.exploit_path: SLO ships no security runtime; a target runbook could ignore recommended controls
residual_risks.compensating_control: Contract makes secure defaults the path of least resistance and routes infra/cloud/AI surfaces to existing security skills; disclosed, not eliminated

residual_risks.risk: Bundle table drifts behind cited standards' editions
residual_risks.exploit_path: A new edition renumbers/renames and the table goes stale (the OWASP-2018->2024 drift this work fixes)
residual_risks.compensating_control: Bundles cite by name + edition year; LOOPS doc names the review cadence
